name: Reginette con sugo di agnello di Lopez Island / Reginette with Lopez Island Lamb Sugo
introduction: Lamb meat can be found on many Italian tables, especially around Easter, and it can take different forms. Here is a classic sugo di agnello made with 100-percent grass-raised lambs from Lopez Island. Lopez, and other islands in the San Juans, has a tradition of natural farming without sprays, chemicals, or fertilized grass. Stonecrest Farm & Graziers is a great example of responsible farming: baby lambs are raised and nurtured by their mothers, running and playing on the hills overlooking the island’s central valley.

ingredients.item: ½ pound lamb shoulder, cut into 1-inch cubes
ingredients.original: ½ pound lamb shoulder, cut into 1-inch cubes

ingredients.item: 32 ounces (4 cups) canned San Marzano tomato puree
ingredients.original: 32 ounces (4 cups) canned San Marzano tomato puree

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.original: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
